feed.title: RIVAL RD (RD-RIV-E-E1) — firmware
feed.subtitle: Production firmware releases for SRAM RD-RIV-E-E1.

entry.title: RIVAL RD (RD-RIV-E-E1) — firmware 2.54.4
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD RD-RIV-E-E1 — firmware 2.54.4

Part: FIVAL RIVAL RD 2x

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported. - Future Product Support

Released: 2025-12-09

entry.title: RIVAL RD (RD-RIV-E-E1) — firmware 2.53.1
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD RD-RIV-E-E1 — firmware 2.53.1

Part: FIVAL RIVAL RD 2x

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2025-09-17

entry.title: RIVAL RD (RD-RIV-E-E1) — firmware 2.49.1
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD RD-RIV-E-E1 — firmware 2.49.1

Part: FIVAL RIVAL RD 2x

* Minor Bug Fixes, Platform updates and reliability improvements * Default shift assignment added for wireless blips

Released: 2024-05-29
